name: unDraw
description: Open-source illustration library offering hundreds of customizable SVG images free for any personal or commercial use. Created by Katerina Limpitsouni with a brand-color customization feature.

seo.title: unDraw — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: unDraw: Open-source illustration library offering hundreds of customizable SVG images free for any personal or commercial use. Created by Katerina Limpitsouni w

when_to_use: Brand-color SVG illustration dropped into empty state screens
Open-source illustration used in developer blog post header
Marketing landing page illustrated without hiring a designer
Onboarding flow illustrated with consistent unDraw character set
Documentation site enriched with topic-matched SVG scenes

pros: Hundreds of free SVG illustrations with broad coverage
Brand color customization without editing vectors
Zero-cost for any personal or commercial use
Consistent flat style works for most product pages
cons: Ubiquity makes the style visually generic
No characters with strong personality or diversity
Style dated compared to newer illustration trends
Limited scene variety beyond standard SaaS tropes
review.verdict: Unbeatable free illustration pack for quick landing pages, but the look screams generic startup — use sparingly.
review.best_for: MVPs and internal tools needing free illustrations with brand color theming.
review.not_for: Brands seeking distinctive visual identity or premium positioning.
